title: Documentation and Consumer Alignment
acceptance_criteria: Docs describe .fabric/rules, stable_id-only identity, neutral fab_plan_context, selection_token, and fab_get_rule_sections.
Docs no longer present fab_get_rules as the primary rule fetch protocol.
Server tool registration matches the new protocol.
Dashboard/HTTP consumers are either updated or explicitly deferred with tracked follow-up.

implementation.description: Write failing tool registration and any affected consumer tests showing fab_get_rule_sections is exposed and old assumptions are stale.
implementation.expected_failure: Tests fail until server registration/docs/consumer contracts are aligned.

implementation.description: Update docs, registration, and consumer contracts or create explicit follow-up deferrals where UI changes are out of scope.
Remove stale wording about path-depth L1 derivation, description stubs, and full-rule injection; keep docs aligned with locked analysis artifacts.
quality_checks: No new dashboard write surfaces are introduced.
